criteria.criterion: Requirements are classified with MoSCoW labels (Must/Should/Could/Won't) and each requirement is individually labeled
Component inventory lists every reusable UI component with its hierarchy (parent-child relationships specified)
Responsive breakpoint strategy specifies behavior at mobile (< 768px), tablet (768-1024px), and desktop (> 1024px)
Route structure lists all pages with their URL paths, dynamic segments, and data requirements
Data flow diagram or description shows how data moves between components and external APIs
Every screen in the app has a layout description specifying major regions (header, sidebar, main content, footer)
Every screen lists its component inventory with component names that match the PRD component inventory
Interactive states (loading, error, empty, populated) are specified for every screen with data dependencies
Mobile layout differences from desktop are explicitly called out for each screen
